use_cases: Music streaming application with soft UI aesthetic
Podcast player interface with neumorphic design
Audio playback controls for entertainment platforms
Demo component for music app UI design systems
ai_summary: A neumorphic-styled music player component featuring soft UI aesthetics with embossed and debossed shadow effects. The component displays album artwork, song metadata, a progress bar, and playback controls (previous, play/pause, next). Designed for media and entertainment applications seeking a modern, tactile visual style with smooth rounded corners and subtle depth.
